title: Everything except the weather
question: 把今天课文里的“梦想地点 -> 计划 -> 日常现实 -> 漏掉的因素”放进你自己的选择场景。用 word bank 补完整 4 个空。
example_answer: I have dreamed of living near the sea. I have planned the house and the school. But I should not decide immediately. I must think about the weather, transport, food, friends, and routine. If it rains continually or is bitterly cold, daily life may be different. I should not think of everything except the weather.
word_bank: have dreamed of living near the sea
have planned the house and the school

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说明你的梦想地点：你一直梦想住在海边
options.expected_phrase: have dreamed of living near the sea

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 说明你已经做过的计划：房子和学校都想好了
options.expected_phrase: have planned the house and the school

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 提醒自己不要太快决定

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 补上最容易漏掉的日常因素：天气也要考虑
